vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1349 (remove(skill): deft-directive-gh-triage -- orphaned from vBRIEF lifecycle, reclaim 'triage' verb for refinement).

plan.title: Remove deft-directive-gh-triage skill and reclaim the 'triage' verb for deft-directive-refinement

narratives.Description: Delete the orphaned deft-directive-gh-triage skill (added 2026-05-11 by #757 as a verbatim port of mattpocock/skills/triage-issue), reclaim the bare 'triage' verb in AGENTS.md skill routing for deft-directive-refinement (the canonical vBRIEF-intake skill), and sweep stale catalog mentions in SPECIFICATION.md / meta/security.md / skills/deft-directive-write-skill/SKILL.md. The skill has zero call sites in active workflow and structurally conflicts with the vBRIEF-as-canonical model -- removal is non-breaking for the canonical lifecycle. NOTE: #1342 and #1343 (the incident artefacts that surfaced this skill defect) are being worked as standalones per operator decision and are NOT closed by this PR.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Delete skills/deft-directive-gh-triage/ and .agents/skills/deft-directive-gh-triage/ directories. 2. Update directive/AGENTS.md ## Skill Routing -- add a routing entry for bare 'triage <N>' / 'triage issue' / 'ingest issue' -> deft-directive-refinement. 3. Mirror to templates/agents-entry.md per #1309 propagation discipline. 4. Extend tests/content/test_agents_entry_contract.py marker list with the new routing entry so future divergence fails CI. 5. Sweep stale catalog references in SPECIFICATION.md (~lines 7655, 8514, 8533, 8859, 8860), meta/security.md (~lines 19, 36, 46), skills/deft-directive-write-skill/SKILL.md (~line 35); replace with one-line pointer to deft-directive-refinement where context warrants. 6. Add CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry per #1242 style explaining the removal + canonical replacement path. 7. Run task check; resolve any skill-enumeration test (e.g. test_skills_dir_only_deft_directive_prefixed) breakage.
narratives.UserStory: As an operator saying 'triage #N' on a GitHub issue, I want a single deterministic outcome -- a vBRIEF in proposed/ that mirrors the source issue with origin-reference dedup baked in -- not a parallel TDD-plan GH issue that has to be reconciled later. As a framework reader, I want the skill catalog to reflect the canonical lifecycle, not historical detritus from the pre-vBRIEF-as-canonical era.

items.title: Delete skills/deft-directive-gh-triage/ canonical and .agents/skills/deft-directive-gh-triage/ stub directories

narrative.Acceptance: Both directories absent; no broken symlinks or dangling references in adjacent files.

items.title: Update AGENTS.md ## Skill Routing to reclaim the 'triage' verb

narrative.Acceptance: Routing entry added: 'triage <N>' / 'triage issue' / 'ingest issue' -> deft-directive-refinement. Existing 'triage hygiene' / 'work the cache' / 'what's next' / 'queue' -> deft-directive-triage routes remain unchanged.

items.title: Mirror the new routing entry into templates/agents-entry.md

narrative.Acceptance: Consumer template matches maintainer AGENTS.md per #1309; tests/content/test_agents_entry_contract.py propagation gate passes.

items.title: Extend #1309 propagation marker list with the new routing entry marker

narrative.Acceptance: tests/content/test_agents_entry_contract.py grows a marker (e.g. 'triage <N>' or 'ingest issue' substring) so future single-side edits to the new routing entry fail CI.

items.title: Sweep stale gh-triage mentions in catalog files

narrative.Acceptance: No live references to gh-triage in SPECIFICATION.md (~lines 7655, 8514, 8533, 8859, 8860), meta/security.md (~lines 19, 36, 46), or skills/deft-directive-write-skill/SKILL.md (~line 35). Completed vBRIEFs untouched (historical record). Original CHANGELOG add entry untouched (history).

items.title: Update skill-enumeration tests to remove gh-triage from expected sets

narrative.Acceptance: tests/content/test_vbrief_model.py::test_skills_dir_only_deft_directive_prefixed and any other skill-enumerating tests pass after removal; no tests reference gh-triage.

items.title: Add CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry explaining removal + canonical replacement path

narrative.Acceptance: 2-4 sentences per #1242 style; leads with user-visible behaviour change (bare 'triage' now produces a vBRIEF in proposed/ via refinement instead of a parallel GH issue); references #1349.

items.title: Run task check end-to-end and resolve any breakage

narrative.Acceptance: task check passes cleanly on the feature branch; encoding gate (#798), branch-policy gate (#747), and #1309 propagation gate all green.

incident_thread: #1342 (gh-triage-produced duplicate of #1341; standalone, NOT closed by this PR)

x-tracking.skill_origin: #757 (re-author of stale #440; verbatim port of mattpocock/skills/triage-issue)

swarm.rationale: Single PR, isolated scope (one skill directory + one routing block + catalog sweep + tests). No depends_on. Good candidate for a focused worker.
